## 📁 Directory Structure

```
📦 [Project Name]/
│
├─ 📄 README.md ⭐ (S+ tier - Project Overview)
├─ 📄 CONTRIBUTING.md (Development Guidelines)
├─ 📄 ARCHITECTURE.md (System Design)
├─ 📄 DEPLOYMENT.md (Detailed Setup & Vercel deployment)
├─ 📄 CHANGELOG.md (Project Status & Versions)
├─ 📄 ACTION_ITEMS.md (Task Backlog)
│
└─ 📁 docs/
   ├─ 📄 INDEX.md (Navigation Hub)

   │
```

## 🚀 How to Get Started

### 👤 For New Developers
1. Read: `README.md`
2. Follow: `DEPLOYMENT.md`
3. Read: `CONTRIBUTING.md`

### 👨‍💻 For AI Agents
1. Read: `AGENTS.md`
2. Check: `ACTION_ITEMS.md` for current sprint tasks.
3. Update: `CHANGELOG.md` upon feature completion.
